allowed_claims: R8 can be shown as a diagnostic failure-analysis and replay asset.
Product can request outcome evidence before method promotion.
blocked_claims: R8 supports Product core method by default
claim_boundary: R8 learnable mechanism artifact. It supports guarded mechanism-causal interaction simulation, interval/risk diagnosis, attribution, and bounded operator update candidates only; it is not point-prediction evidence, not field validation, and not runtime default authorization.

evidence_requests.why_needed: R8 cannot move beyond diagnostic-only without real outcome validation.
Risk ranking and abnormal segment claims require segment-level outcome support.

executive_summary.primary_message: R8 当前不能支撑 Product 核心方法声明，但可作为失败诊断、证据请求和 outcome replay 工作流资产。

failure_cards.customer_question: 为什么当前不能把 R8 当成默认人群模拟方法？
failure_cards.evidence: R8 wins only risk_ranking_quality; R7 v2 or R6/static baselines still win trend, interval, false alarm, and static-miss recovery metrics.
failure_cards.product_response: 系统展示 R8 的失败归因和对照结果，但不把它作为默认预测或策略建议方法。
failure_cards.title: R8 尚未超过固定规则 baseline

failure_cards.customer_question: 哪些指标还不足以支撑产品核心价值？
failure_cards.evidence: Root cause reported by stop-loss diagnosis: insufficient_metric_dominance.
failure_cards.product_response: 报告继续展示趋势、区间、风险排序和异常群体，但把支撑等级标为诊断态。
failure_cards.title: R8 没有形成多指标优势

failure_cards.customer_question: 为什么不能直接上线自动更新？
failure_cards.product_response: 系统保留 replay 与 guard 输出，真实启用前必须重新通过鲁棒性和 holdout gate。
failure_cards.title: 鲁棒性与 holdout gate 被阻断

failure_cards.customer_question: 需要客户提供什么结果数据才能进入方法验证？
failure_cards.product_response: 系统要求对齐场景、群体、观测窗口和结果指标后，才能做 outcome replay 与更新候选。
failure_cards.title: 缺少真实 field/customer outcome

failure_cards.customer_question: 为什么结果只能展示为诊断，而不是自动决策？
failure_cards.evidence: Root cause reported by stop-loss diagnosis: runtime_default_guard_blocked.
failure_cards.product_response: Product 可以呈现风险边界和证据请求，但不会默认启用 R8 更新算子。
failure_cards.title: runtime default guard 未通过

steps.goal: 重放当前 R8 被阻断的 method support 与 root cause。
同口径比较 static prior、R6/R7 baseline 与 R8 输出。
接入真实场景结果、群体标签和观测窗口。
重新运行 robustness、holdout、field outcome 与 runtime default gate。

product_positioning: 人群反应趋势与风险区间模拟器
